Title: Create a new user
Test Steps:
1. Call the constructor Utente() to create a new instance.
2. Set the Id using setId(1).
3. Set the password using setPassword("password123").
4. Set the email using setEmail("test@example.com").
5. Set the name using setNome("John").
6. Set the surname using setCognome("Doe").
Expected Result:
- A new Utente object is created with all attributes correctly set.
- getId() returns 1.
- getPassword() returns "password123".
- getEmail() returns "test@example.com".
- getNome() returns "John".
- getCognome() returns "Doe".

Title: Create a new product
Test Data:
- Nome: "Laptop"
- Luogo: "Milan"
- Descrizione: "High-performance laptop"
- Immagine: "laptop.jpg"
- Prezzo: 999.99
- Proprietario: Utente with Id 1
Test Steps:
1. Call the constructor Prodotto() to create a new instance.
2. Set the name using setNome("Laptop").
3. Set the location using setLuogo("Milan").
4. Set the description using setDescrizione("High-performance laptop").
5. Set the image using setImmagine("laptop.jpg").
6. Set the price using setPrezzo(999.99).
7. Set the owner using setProprietario(Utente with Id 1).
Expected Result:
- A new Prodotto object is created with all attributes correctly set.
- getNome() returns "Laptop".
- getLuogo() returns "Milan".
- getDescrizione() returns "High-performance laptop".
- getImmagine() returns "laptop.jpg".
- getPrezzo() returns 999.99.
- getProprietario().getId() returns 1.

Title: Create a new report
Test Data:
- Tipo: True
- Id: 1
- Titolo: "Spamming"
- Descrizione: "User is spamming in the forum."
- UtenteSegnalato: Utente with Id 2
- Autore: Utente with Id 1
Test Steps:
1. Call the constructor Segnalazione() to create a new instance.
2. Set the type using setTipo(True).
3. Set the id using setId(1).
4. Set the title using setTitolo("Spamming").
5. Set the description using setDescrizione("User is spamming in the forum.").
6. Set the reported user using setUtenteSegnalato(Utente with Id 2).
7. Set the author using setAutore(Utente with Id 1).
Expected Result:
- A new Segnalazione object is created with all attributes correctly set.
- getTipo() returns True.
- getId() returns 1.
- getTitolo() returns "Spamming".
- getDescrizione() returns "User is spamming in the forum.".
- getUtenteSegnalato().getId() returns 2.
- getAutore().getId() returns 1.
